title: Universal Full Tang Spiked Axe Tomahawk Wooden Handle Ultra Lightweight Tactical
description:
This lightweight hatchet is easy to carry along almost anywhere. Exceptional for light jobs, it's great for when you need something portable that won't add too much weight. It's powerful and durable, yet easy to carry around and use. The axe is sleek with cutouts in the handle to reduce the weight further. This 11" hatchet sports a 3 1/2" blade, a pick, and a steel spike on the bottom of the handle. Not recommended for throwing.

Universal Full Tang Spiked Axe Tomahawk Wooden Handle Ultra Lightweight Tactical

This lightweight hatchet is easy to carry along almost anywhere. Exceptional for light jobs, it's great for when you need something portable that won't add too much weight. It's powerful and durable, yet easy to carry around and use.

Key Features

  • Full Tang 1045 Surgical Steel Construction
  • Hardwood Handle Overlay
  • 3 1/2" Blade | 11" Overall
  • Nylon Scabbard with belt loop
  • Exposed steel Spike on the knob of the handle

Product Specifications

  • MPN: H-79-143
  • UPC: 153722078496
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 11 in

The axe is sleek with cutouts in the handle to reduce the weight further. This 11" hatchet sports a 3 1/2" blade, a pick, and a steel spike on the bottom of the handle.

Not recommended for throwing.
